source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/231013 컨설팅 추가 리뷰(CER 외)/아비즈 MDR TCF_231013/A-TCF-5-152 Quality Documents (rev.1).docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Manufacturer quality documentation summary for H&abyz Co., Ltd. describing quality controls and listing QMS procedures.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by identifying manufacturer information, quality control arrangements, and controlled quality management system documents.
keyPoints: Manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd. with manufacturing site in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea.
Quality Manual AQM-001 is designed to meet ISO 13485:2016, KGMP, FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, EU 2017/745, and customer requirements.
Quality documentation is managed under the manufacturer's quality management system.
Listed quality documents include procedures for document control, design and development, risk management, UDI, vigilance, FDA MDR reporting, CAPA, complaints, and adverse event reporting.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly stated in the source text; the source path includes 231013 but this was not treated as a document date.
Authority context is ambiguous: metadata authoritySignal is FDA, while the path references CE MDR and the text cites ISO 13485:2016, KGMP, FDA CFR Part 820-QSR:2017, and EU 2017/745.
Product models were extracted from the source path rather than the body text.
